_comment: Conversational short-circuit DETECTION patterns (greeting / capabilities / thanks / farewell). Externalized 2026-06-02 from ConversationalHandler.cs so the matchers are tunable + multilingual without recompiling. Per-locale: each kind is a list of case-insensitive, anchored (^...$) regex strings; all locales' lists are merged. The 'en' set is byte-identical to the in-code fallback, so English behavior is unchanged until an operator edits this file. Reply TEXT lives separately in copilot-text.json (CopilotTextCatalog.Conversational*). Behavior contract: file ABSENT -> in-code English fallback; PRESENT -> this drives detection. The <=80-char guard stays in code. Order is fixed in code: capabilities, then greeting, then thanks, then farewell.

capabilities: ^\s*(?:賲丕匕丕\s+(?:賷賲賰賳賰|鬲爻鬲胤賷毓|亘廿賲賰丕賳賰)|賲丕\s+(?:賴賷\s+)?(?:賯丿乇丕鬲賰|廿賲賰丕賳賷丕鬲賰|賲賷夭丕鬲賰)|賰賷賮\s+鬲毓賲賱|賲賳\s+兀賳鬲|毓乇賾賮\s+亘賳賮爻賰|爻丕毓丿賳賷|賲爻丕毓丿丞|兀毓胤賳賷\s+兀賲孬賱丞|丕毓胤賳賷\s+丕賲孬賱丞)[!責.\s]*$
greeting: ^\s*(?:賲乇丨亘丕|賲乇丨亘賸丕|丕賴賱丕|兀賴賱丕|兀賴賱賸丕|丕賱爻賱丕賲\s+毓賱賷賰賲|氐亘丕丨\s+丕賱禺賷乇|賲爻丕亍\s+丕賱禺賷乇|賴丕賷)\s*[!.責]*\s*$
thanks: ^\s*(?:卮賰乇丕|卮賰乇賸丕|卮賰乇丕\s+(?:噩夭賷賱丕|賱賰)|賲鬲卮賰乇|賲賲鬲丕夭|乇丕卅毓|噩賲賷賱|兀丨爻賳鬲)\s*[!.]*\s*$
farewell: ^\s*(?:賲毓\s+丕賱爻賱丕賲丞|賵丿丕毓丕|賵丿丕毓賸丕|廿賱賶\s+丕賱賱賯丕亍|丕賱賶\s+丕賱賱賯丕亍|亘丕賷|兀乇丕賰\s+賱丕丨賯丕)\s*[!.]*\s*$
